{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"2","subject":"Create core services: auth, network, persistence (Stage 2)","description":"Create core service files for saju-flutter, porting from iOS Swift:

1. `lib/core/persistence/secure_storage_service.dart` — flutter_secure_storage wrapper for tokens (accessToken, refreshToken keys). Port from KeychainService.swift.

2. `lib/core/persistence/profile_storage.dart` — SharedPreferences wrapper for UserProfile JSON. Port from ProfileStorage.swift.

3. `lib/core/auth/pkce_helper.dart` — PKCE code verifier (64 random bytes → base64url) and challenge (SHA256 → base64url). Port from PKCEHelper.swift. Use dart:crypto package.

4. `lib/core/network/api_error.dart` — ApiError sealed class with invalidUrl, httpError(statusCode, message), decodingError, networkError, unknown. Korean error messages.

5. `lib/core/network/api_client.dart` — Dio-based REST client. POST and GET with optional auth. 401 retry with token refresh. Convenience methods: calculateSaju, calculateCompatibility, calculateDailyFortune. Port from APIClient.swift.

6. `lib/core/network/auth_interceptor.dart` — Dio interceptor that adds Bearer token and handles 401 refresh retry.

7. `lib/core/network/sse_client.dart` — http package StreamedResponse SSE client. Parse `data: {"text":"..."}` lines, yield text chunks, finish on `data: [DONE]`. Include InterpretationSection model and parseSections() static method. Port from SSEClient.swift.

8. `lib/core/auth/auth_state.dart` — AuthState enum: unauthenticated, authenticated, loading

9. `lib/core/auth/auth_manager.dart` — Riverpod AsyncNotifier: restoreSession, loginWithChatGPT (url_launcher), exchangeCode, refreshTokens, logout. Port from AuthManager.swift.

Read iOS source files at /Users/kangnam/projects/saju/saju-ios/SajuForum/ for exact logic.","assignedBy":"stage2-core","timestamp":"2026-03-03T07:56:09.311Z"}
